chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl.Misc.Appln.No. S – 112 of 2024. Date Order with signature of Judge For Hearing of main case. - 02-04-2024. Mr.Abdul Sattar A. Thaheem Advocate for applicant. Mr.Sardar Ali Shah DPG. - O R D E R. ZULIFQUAR ALI SANGI, J- Through this miscellaneous application, applicant Rashid Ali has assailed the order dated 28.02.2024 passed by the learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-officio Justice of Peace, Mirpur Mathelo in Cr.Misc.Appln.No. 66/2024 filed under Section 22-A 6(i), Cr.P.C for registration of FIR against the proposed accused. 2. Since the facts of the prosecution case has already been mentioned in the order as well as this misc. application, therefore, there is no need to repeat the same. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the impugned order of the learned Justice of Peace is illegal and against the law, which calls for interference by this Court while the learned Addl.P.G appearing for the State has supported the impugned order. 4. Heard arguments and perused the impugned order and the material available on record. After perusal of the same, I found that very speaking order based on sound reasoning, has been passed by the learned trial Court, which does not suffer from any illegality or material irregularity. Consequently, instant miscellaneous application is dismissed. Crl.M.A.No. S – 112 of 2024 stands disposed of alongwith the pending applications, if any. JUDGE Akber.
